dna.origin_story: The lovechild of a Star Wars production designer, a Linux developer, and a rebellious revenue strategist.
dna.mission: Dismantling boring, safe corporate identities to build high-impact, strategically sound hotel brands.

service_pillars.title: Revenue Strategy
service_pillars.focus: Deep-dive analysis and unique pricing strategies.
service_pillars.rebel_edge: Uncovering untapped revenue by ignoring industry 'best practices' that don't scale.

service_pillars.title: Optimized Distribution
service_pillars.rebel_edge: Building distribution ecosystems that work for the hotel, not the OTA.

service_pillars.title: Curated Tech
service_pillars.focus: Auditing and overhauling hotel tech stacks.
service_pillars.rebel_edge: Eliminating 'bloatware' and integrating only what drives performance.

service_pillars.title: Brand Activation
service_pillars.rebel_edge: Fusing cultural insights with captivating storytelling to cut through noise.
